name: Burn
description: Fire damage each turn. Reduces endurance.
tooltip: Burning — fire damage each turn, endurance reduced

name: Poison
description: Poison damage each turn. Reduces conviction.
tooltip: Poisoned — poison damage each turn, conviction reduced

name: Bleed
description: Bleed damage each turn. Reduces endurance.
tooltip: Bleeding — bleed damage each turn, endurance reduced

name: Stun
description: Cannot act this turn.
tooltip: Stunned — cannot act this turn

name: Sleep
description: Deeply unconscious. Cannot act. Broken by taking damage.
tooltip: Asleep — cannot act, broken by damage

name: Silence
description: Cannot use mana-based skills.
tooltip: Silenced — mana skills are blocked

name: Freeze
description: Immobilized by cold. Actions are significantly slower.
tooltip: Frozen — actions take much longer

name: Weaken
description: Reduced conviction and ambition. Deals less damage.
tooltip: Weakened — deals less damage

name: Slow
description: Actions take longer. Reduced ambition.
tooltip: Slowed — actions take longer

name: Knockback
description: Knocked back. Next action is delayed.
tooltip: Knocked Back — next action delayed

name: Blind
description: Reduced accuracy and evasion.
tooltip: Blinded — reduced accuracy and evasion

name: Confused
description: Disoriented. Reduced harmony and ambition.
tooltip: Confused — disoriented, reduced harmony and ambition

name: Dazed
description: Dazed. Reduced conviction, ambition, and harmony.
tooltip: Dazed — reduced conviction, ambition, and harmony

name: Cursed
description: Takes more damage. Stamina recovery reduced.
tooltip: Cursed — takes more damage, reduced stamina recovery

name: Armor Break
description: Defenses shattered. Takes significantly more damage.
tooltip: Armor Broken — significantly increased damage taken

name: Conviction Drain
description: Reduced conviction. Deals less damage, weaker spells.
tooltip: Conviction Drained — reduced damage and spell power

name: Endurance Crack
description: Cracked defenses. Takes more damage.
tooltip: Endurance Cracked — defenses compromised, takes more damage

name: Ambition Falter
description: Lost focus. Reduced accuracy and initiative.
tooltip: Ambition Faltered — reduced accuracy and initiative

name: Harmony Discord
description: Internal chaos. Reduced healing and support effectiveness.
tooltip: Harmony Discord — reduced healing and support

name: Attack Boost
description: Attacks deal more damage.
tooltip: Attack Boosted — attacks deal more damage

name: Strength
description: Greatly increased conviction and ambition.
tooltip: Strength — greatly increased damage output

name: Spell Amplification
description: Spells and magic skills are more powerful.
tooltip: Spell Amplified — spells deal more damage

name: Poison Weapon
description: Weapon coated in poison. Attacks have a 25% chance to poison the target.
tooltip: Weapon Poisoned — attacks apply poison on hit (25% chance)

name: Stun Weapon
description: Weapon charged with stunning force. Attacks have a 15% chance to stun.
tooltip: Weapon Charged — attacks can stun on hit (15% chance)

name: Fortitude
description: Reduced damage taken. Increased endurance.
tooltip: Fortitude — reduced incoming damage

name: Protection
description: Blessed protection reduces all incoming damage.
tooltip: Protected — all incoming damage reduced

name: Barrier
description: Magical barrier absorbs incoming damage.
tooltip: Barrier — absorbs incoming damage

name: Endurance Shield
description: Greatly increased endurance-based defenses.
tooltip: Endurance Shield — greatly boosted defenses

name: Evasion Boost
description: Increased agility. Harder to hit, faster actions.
tooltip: Evasion Boosted — harder to hit

name: Stealth
description: Hidden from enemies. Next attack deals bonus damage.
tooltip: Stealthed — hidden, next attack deals bonus damage

name: Regeneration
description: Restores health each turn.
tooltip: Regenerating — restores health each turn

name: Haste
description: Actions are significantly faster.
tooltip: Haste — actions are faster

name: Speed Boost
description: Faster actions and improved initiative.
tooltip: Speed Boosted — faster and harder hitting

name: Focus
description: Increased accuracy and crit chance via conviction boost.
tooltip: Focused — increased accuracy and crit chance

name: All Stats
description: All stats boosted. Everything is enhanced.
tooltip: All Stats Boosted — every attribute improved

name: Conviction Surge
description: Conviction greatly boosted. Damage and spells enhanced.
tooltip: Conviction Surge — boosted damage and spells

name: Ambition Edge
description: Ambition greatly boosted. Precision and crit enhanced.
tooltip: Ambition Edge — boosted precision and crit

name: Harmony Bond
description: Harmony greatly boosted. Healing and support enhanced.
tooltip: Harmony Bond — boosted healing and support

name: Harmony
description: Attuned to natural rhythms. Harmony and endurance boosted.
tooltip: Harmony — attuned to natural rhythms, harmony and endurance boosted

name: Echo
description: Skills resonate, boosting harmony and conviction.
tooltip: Echo — skills resonate, boosted harmony and conviction

name: Unity
description: Bonded with allies. All stats moderately boosted.
tooltip: Unity — bonded with allies, all stats boosted

name: Amplify
description: Amplified power. Conviction and ambition greatly boosted.
tooltip: Amplified — conviction and ambition greatly boosted

name: Loot Luck
description: Fortune favours you. Better loot odds after combat.
tooltip: Lucky — improved loot quality after combat

name: Defense
description: Defensive stance. Incoming damage reduced.
tooltip: Defense Stance — incoming damage reduced

name: Taunt
description: Taunted. More likely to attack the actor who placed this debuff.
tooltip: Taunted — More likely to attack the actor who placed this debuff

name: Weak Poison
description: Mild poison. Small damage each turn.
tooltip: Weakly Poisoned — mild poison damage each turn

name: Strong Poison
description: Potent poison. Heavy damage each turn. Reduces conviction.
tooltip: Strongly Poisoned — heavy poison damage each turn, conviction reduced

name: Deadly Poison
description: Lethal poison. Severe damage each turn. Cripples conviction and endurance.
tooltip: Deadly Poison — severe damage each turn, conviction and endurance crippled

name: Chilled
description: Cold seeps into the body. Damage each turn, slowed actions, reduced ambition.
tooltip: Chilled — cold damage each turn, actions slowed

name: Electrified
description: Electricity arcs through the body. Damage each turn, sporadic and disorienting.
tooltip: Electrified — electric damage each turn, conviction reduced

name: Shadowed
description: Shadow energy corrupts the spirit. Damage each turn, harmony drained.
tooltip: Shadowed — shadow damage each turn, harmony reduced

name: Arcane Burn
description: Unstable arcane energy tears through the body. Damage each turn, spells disrupted.
tooltip: Arcane Burn — arcane damage each turn, conviction and harmony reduced

name: Mana Burn
description: Arcane fire consumes mana each turn. Cripples spellcasters.
tooltip: Mana Burning — mana drained each turn, mana recovery reduced

name: Exhaustion
description: Completely spent. Cannot use stamina-based skills.
tooltip: Exhausted — stamina skills are blocked

name: Deep Wound
description: A wound that worsens with each strike. Escalating bleed damage.
tooltip: Deep Wound — escalating bleed damage, gets worse each hit

name: Counter Ready
description: Poised to retaliate. The next hit taken triggers a counter-attack.
tooltip: Counter Ready — next hit triggers a counter-attack

name: Marked
description: Exposed and targeted. Enemies are drawn to attack this combatant.
tooltip: Marked — characters are more likely to be targeted

name: Provoked
description: Enraged and reckless. More likely to be targeted, attacks slowed.
tooltip: Provoked — likely to be targeted, actions slowed

name: Siphon Ward
description: Life force drains toward attackers on each hit.
tooltip: Siphon Ward — attackers heal when striking this target

name: Life Leech
description: Vitality bleeds away to sustain the caster.
tooltip: Life Leech — losing HP each turn, healing the one who cast it

name: Cursed Blood
description: Each wound feeds the one who cursed them.
tooltip: Cursed Blood — strikes against this target may leech life back

name: Bloodlust
tooltip: Conviction surging — dealing increased damage
description: Primal aggression heightens conviction.

name: Berserker Stance
tooltip: Pain feeds rage — conviction grows with each hit
description: Each blow received fuels increasingly dangerous aggression.

name: Fortified
tooltip: Damage greatly reduced — holding the line
description: The Dwarf has dug in, nearly immovable.
